title: Village Taverns (Brewin' And Chewin' Compatibility)
description: A small resource pack that adds compatibility between Village Taverns and Brewin' And Chewin'
body:
A small resource pack that adds compatibility between [Village Taverns](https://modrinth.com/mod/village-taverns) and [Brewin' And Chewin'](https://modrinth.com/mod/brewin-and-chewin)

 

Made primarity for the [Dungeon Heroes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/dungeon-heroes) Modpack!

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_d589d0c8-12c0-4615-83c6-d13c9253147f.png)![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_1a01e507-5c42-40c5-a496-59629ea97b87.png)

[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/797/189/logo_ramparts_bg.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/dungeon-heroes)

Thank you to Probleyes in the Chefs Delight Discord for permision to upload this!
